stemHtml: The limits of the white scale of an airspeed indicator are…

options.a: V<sub>S0</sub> for the lower limit and V<sub>FE</sub> for the upper limit
options.b: V<sub>S1</sub> for the lower limit and V<sub>FE</sub> for the upper limit
options.c: V<sub>S1</sub> for the lower limit and V<sub>LE </sub>for the upper limit
options.d: V<sub>S0</sub> for the lower limit and V<sub>LE</sub> for the upper limit
